_comment: SYNTHETIC test fixture for the Skill 60 EWS sentinel test suite. No client data. announce-cron: identical to baseline-clean.json PLUS a second cron entry, 'daily-report', delivery=announce targeting a non-operator chat ('client'). Drives the S10 announce-to-non-operator P1 case (config/monitored-keys.json: cron, escalate_announce_nonoperator=P1) -- the exact --no-deliver client-spam trap this signal exists to catch. See tests/fixtures/README.md, REPAIRS.md signal table row S10, and tests/drills/D-ALERT.md.
